title: Mistake: VideoMAE Features Destroy Cross-Subject Generalization
summary: **What happened:** Integrated pretrained VideoMAE features (768-dim) into PatchTST as an additional token in self-attention. OOF improved dramatically (0.5204 → 0.6087) but LB collapsed (0.5858 → 0.1321).
what_happened: Integrated pretrained VideoMAE features (768-dim) into PatchTST as an additional token in self-attention. OOF improved dramatically (0.5204 → 0.6087) but LB collapsed (0.5858 → 0.1321).
